note: Zipmex paused withdrawals during broader crypto-credit stress.
Zipmex disclosed 48 million dollars of Babel exposure and 5 million dollars of Celsius exposure.
Zipmex said it would resume withdrawals while still addressing lender exposure.
Transfers from Z Wallet to trade wallets remained unavailable after trade-wallet withdrawals were enabled.
Zipmex began releasing selected Z Wallet assets while other assets remained on a later schedule.
Zipmex filed for bankruptcy protection in Singapore after the withdrawal halt.
Singapore Courts published hearing information for the Zipmex moratorium applications.
